summary: Remove the Workbench admin/password auth facade from the red-zone WorkbenchStore boundary.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is the BFF persistence facade. This PR removes the obsolete admin login/session methods after the Workbench routes have moved to the local actor model, without adding fallback auth behavior.
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_api.py -k legacy_workbench_user_sessions_table -q
